rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal value and has no relation to Educ. Code §22.007, which prohibits school district early retirement incentives.
quote: A district may not offer or provide a financial or other incentive to an employee of the district to encourage the employee to retire from the Teacher Retirement System of Texas.
_note: No overlap between subject matter of proposed change (property tax homestead exemption) and rule (early retirement incentives for school district employees).
